# FoodieHub

> FoodieHub is a food ordering and delivery app where customers browse local restaurants, order meals, and track delivery in real time.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured restaurants, cuisines, and how FoodieHub works.
- [Restaurants](/restaurants): Browse all partner restaurants with ratings and delivery times.
- [Burger Palace menu](/menu/1): Example restaurant menu page (American, burgers).
- [Pizza Haven menu](/menu/2): Example restaurant menu page (Italian, pizza).
